tiles.title: Avg Messages/Session
tiles.description: Average bot messages per user session

tiles.title: Avg Message Length (chars)
tiles.description: Average bot message length in characters

tiles.title: Total Topic Starts
tiles.description: Number of topic starts in time range

tiles.title: Session Length Distribution
tiles.description: Distribution of sessions by message count

tiles.title: Daily Event Breakdown
tiles.description: Daily breakdown of events by type

queries.text:
customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where name == "BotMessageSend"
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| summarize MessageCount = count() by user_Id, SessionDate = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| summarize AvgMessages = avg(MessageCount)
| extend AvgMessages = round(AvgMessages, 2)
| project AvgMessages

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where name == "BotMessageSend"
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| extend messageText = tostring(customDimensions['message'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(messageText)
| extend MessageLength = strlen(messageText)
| summarize AvgLength = avg(MessageLength)
| extend AvgLength = round(AvgLength, 2)
| project AvgLength

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where name == "TopicStart"
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| summarize TotalTopicStarts = count()
| project TotalTopicStarts

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| summarize UniqueEventTypes = dcount(name)
| project UniqueEventTypes

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where name == "BotMessageSend"
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| summarize MessageCount = count() by user_Id, SessionDate = bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend LengthCategory = case(
    MessageCount == 1, "Single Message",
    MessageCount <= 5, "Short (2-5)",
    MessageCount <= 15, "Medium (6-15)",
    MessageCount <= 30, "Long (16-30)",
    "Very Long (30+)"
)
| summarize SessionCount = count(), AvgMessages = avg(MessageCount) by LengthCategory
| extend AvgMessages = round(AvgMessages, 2)
| project LengthCategory, SessionCount, AvgMessages
| order by SessionCount desc

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| summarize EventCount = count() by EventType = name
| order by EventCount desc

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| extend messageText = tostring(customDimensions['message'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| where isnotempty(user_Id)
| summarize
    TotalInteractions = count(),
    BotMessages = countif(name == "BotMessageSend"),
    TopicStarts = countif(name == "TopicStart"),
    AvgMessageLength = avgif(strlen(messageText), name == "BotMessageSend" and isnotempty(messageText)),
    DaysActive = dcount(bin(timestamp, 1d))
    by UserId = user_Id
| extend
    AvgMessageLength = round(AvgMessageLength, 2),
    AvgInteractionsPerDay = round(todouble(TotalInteractions) / todouble(DaysActive), 2)
| extend EngagementLevel = case(
    TotalInteractions >= 50 and DaysActive >= 7, "High",
    TotalInteractions >= 20 and DaysActive >= 3, "Medium",
    TotalInteractions >= 5, "Low",
    "Minimal"
)
| project UserId, TotalInteractions, BotMessages, TopicStarts, AvgInteractionsPerDay, DaysActive, EngagementLevel, AvgMessageLength
| order by TotalInteractions desc
| take 50

customEvents
| where timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend isDesignMode = tostring(customDimensions['designMode'])
| extend messageText = tostring(customDimensions['message'])
| where isempty(isDesignMode) or tolower(isDesignMode) != "true"
| summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    BotMessages = countif(name == "BotMessageSend"),
    TopicStarts = countif(name == "TopicStart"),
    TopicEnds = countif(name == "TopicEnd"),
    UniqueUsers = dcount(user_Id),
    AvgMessageLength = avgif(strlen(messageText), name == "BotMessageSend" and isnotempty(messageText))
    by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| extend AvgMessageLength = round(AvgMessageLength, 2)
| project Date = timestamp, UniqueUsers, BotMessages, TopicStarts, TopicEnds, TotalEvents, AvgMessageLength
| order by Date desc
